name: @neuralgentics/root
description: Neuralgentics — coding agent built on OpenCode

scripts.install:all: bun install && cd packages/memini-core && uv sync
scripts.dev:memini: cd packages/memini-core && uv run python -m memini_core.server
scripts.test: bun test packages/plugin && cd packages/memini-core && uv run pytest
scripts.lint: eslint packages/ && cd packages/memini-core && ruff check
